label: Unified rate reached $12
summary: Nevada minimum wage reached $12 per hour for all employers on July 1, 2024, eliminating the two-tier health insurance system.

label: Program launches January 2026
summary: Minnesota PFML contributions begin January 1, 2026. Employers must register with DEED and begin payroll deductions.

label: CFPB enforcement further curtailed
summary: Trump 2025 administration issued new directives reducing CFPB supervisory examinations — consumer mortgage protections may be weakened.
